title: Layer
description: Layer: A layer object with given material and thickness

Material.description: The material this layer is made up of Material: Physical material to be used for Takeoffs and asigned to Physical elements. Material is capable of storing discipline specific data in Properties.

Thickness.description: The thickness of this material layer Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
